prompt: Build me a marketing landing page with great SEO, nice animations, and make sure the OG image previews look good on Twitter and LinkedIn. Oh and I need hreflang tags because we're launching in 3 languages.

assertions.text: Output identifies 4+ distinct domains from the prompt (frontend, design, SEO, i18n, social/OG)
Output maps identified domains to specific installed skills (seo:*, design-for-ai:*, etc.)
Output identifies at least one skill gap where no installed skill covers the need
Output mentions validating publisher authenticity or trust score for recommended packages
Output assigns a design agent for UI/UX work (not just coders for everything)
Output decomposes into sub-projects that reflect the multi-domain nature (not a monolithic approach)
